reason: Global TianChen-RV invariants: C++/MLIR stack, descriptor-driven computation debt, unified RISC-V boundary.
Architecture boundary forbidding descriptor compute authority and one-backend-per-family drift.
Bounded linalg RVV binary frontend contract and execution-planning pipeline boundary.
Common EmitC route and descriptor boundary for typed extension-family ops.
Runtime ABI layering for mem_window/runtime_param and target artifact export contracts.
Plugin/interface orchestration boundary and no family-specific core semantic branches.
Required lit/FileCheck and C++ validation scope for frontend lowering and export paths.
